construction.title: Construction
construction.text: Structural timber and engineered panels for load-bearing systems and facades.
construction.detail: Specified for contractors needing predictable tolerances, dry stock and repeatable batch quality.

furniture.title: Furniture
furniture.text: Stable and visually refined materials for custom furniture and serial production.
furniture.detail: From premium fronts to concealed carcass structures with machining-ready panel dimensions.

interior.title: Interior Design
interior.text: Decorative surfaces and precision cuts for premium interior concepts.
interior.detail: Selected textures and calibrated tones for hospitality, office and residential design projects.

outdoor.title: Outdoor
outdoor.text: Thermo-treated and moisture-resistant options for terraces and exterior envelopes.
outdoor.detail: Durability-focused material choices for weather-exposed decks, facades and outdoor joinery.

About.title: About Forstwerk
About.subtitle: Natural quality. Engineered precision. We combine controlled sourcing with production discipline.
About.introOne: Forstwerk operates as a material partner for architects, manufacturers and procurement teams who need consistent timber quality under real production timelines.
About.introTwo: Our supply chain is built around traceable forestry regions, kiln-drying discipline and precision cutting workflows that keep dimensional tolerances stable from lot to lot.
About.introThree: We work for long-term durability, not visual effect alone: every board is selected for performance across humidity shifts, installation load and finishing compatibility.
About.companyText: We supply timber materials to workshops, developers and industrial buyers across Europe.
About.productionText: Our process includes drying, grading, cutting and quality control with digital traceability.
About.philosophyText: Material first, process second, promises third. We focus on what performs in real projects.
About.principleOneText: Certified origin timber with lot-level traceability and stable sourcing relationships.
About.principleTwoText: Drying, calibration and machining aligned with engineering tolerances and project deadlines.
About.principleThreeText: Specifications tuned for real-world wear, climate shifts and lifecycle maintenance.

Certifications.title: Certifications
Certifications.subtitle: Verified standards for sustainability, structural safety and transparent origin.
Certifications.description: Certification package and audit references are available per shipment or framework contract.

Contact.title: Contact & Quote
Contact.subtitle: Send your drawings or requirements and receive a commercial offer with lead times.
Contact.fastText: For urgent projects, include quantity, target date and delivery location.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.success: Thank you. Your quote request has been received and our team will contact you shortly.
Contact.required: Please fill in name, email and project details before submitting.
Contact.error: For urgent bulk orders, include target volume and preferred delivery week.

Home.heroTitle: Wood materials with architectural character and industrial discipline.
Home.heroSubtitle: From premium solid wood to engineered panels and custom cuts, built for B2B reliability and B2C quality expectations.
Home.philosophyText: Our platform balances tactile presentation with technical clarity, so teams can move from inspiration to procurement without friction.
Home.trustText: Annual output with quality checkpoints and verified source documentation.
Home.finalText: Need non-standard dimensions or long-term supply? Our sales engineers build a delivery plan around your production calendar.
